consent.title: Before You Begin
consent.statement1: This is a self-guided reflection tool built on Solution-Focused Brief Coaching questions. It is a structured form, not a person-led or AI-led service. It stores what you type privately and shows it back to you.
consent.statement2: This tool is not therapy. It is not crisis support. It is not professional advice of any kind. If you are in crisis or distress, please use the support resources linked at the bottom of every screen.
consent.statement3: Your outcomes depend entirely on your own reflection. The tool contributes nothing except the questions and the structure.
consent.checkbox1: I understand this is a pre-programmed form, not a person or AI.
consent.checkbox2: I understand this is not therapy, crisis support, or professional advice.
consent.checkbox3: I understand the tool stores my text privately and may run limited phrase-based distress checks only to show support resources.
consent.checkbox4: I understand I can exit or pause at any time.
consent.startButton: I Agree — Set Up My Private Vault
consent.returningSummary: This tool is a structured form, not therapy or professional advice. It stores your text privately and may show support resources when limited phrase-based checks detect distress language.

encryption.title: Choose your privacy level
encryption.recoverableDesc: Your data can be recovered if you change or reset your password. Slightly less secure.
encryption.strongDesc: Data cannot be recovered if you change or reset your password. If you forget your password, all session data is permanently lost.
encryption.accountPasswordDesc: Your account password will be used to encrypt your CoachMe data. If you change or reset your account password, you must unlock your vault with the new password.

errors.saveFailed: Could not save. Please try again.

focus.title: What brings you here today?
focus.focusTagLabel: What area would you like to focus on?
focus.whyImportantLabel: Why is this important to you right now?
focus.whyImportantPlaceholder: e.g., It has been taking up energy and I want a clearer way forward...
focus.sessionGoalLabel: What is your goal for this session?
focus.sessionGoalPlaceholder: e.g., Decide what I want to say and what my first move is...
focus.topicPlaceholder: e.g., I want to think through a conversation I keep postponing...
focus.successCriteriaLabel: What needs to happen for this session to feel successful?
focus.successCriteriaPlaceholder: e.g., I leave with one small next step I trust enough to try...

miracle.title: The Preferred Future
miracle.subtitle: Picture the preferred future you want to move toward...
miracle.questionA: Suppose a miracle happens tonight while you sleep, and the situation you brought to this session is completely resolved. Because you were sleeping, you didn't know it happened. What is the very first small thing you notice tomorrow morning that tells you the miracle occurred?
miracle.questionB: What would be the next sign after that?
miracle.questionC: What would the people around you notice that was different about you?
miracle.optionalLabel: Anything else you want to add about your preferred future?
miracle.verificationSubtitle: These are exact copies of what you wrote.

action.title: Your Next Step
action.questionLabel: What is one concrete, realistic action you want to take from this session?
action.refineLabel: Would you like to refine or improve this step? (optional)
action.refinePlaceholder: e.g., Shrink it down — commit to just 15 minutes on Tuesday...
action.optionalLabel: Any other possible steps or notes?

synthesis.title: Your Session Summary
synthesis.finalLabel: Any final reflections or additional notes for this session?
synthesis.actionMenuTitle: What would you like to do next?
synthesis.newSameFocus: Start a new walkthrough on the same focus
synthesis.recentMoments: Great moments from recent days and weeks

scaling.title: Scaling the Preferred Future
scaling.slopeLabel: The peak is 10 (the magic dream), the base is 1 (deepest trouble). Where are you standing now?
scaling.backpackLabel: A {{score}}? Excellent. What makes it a {{score}}? What is already in your backpack: strengths, resources, or things you have already achieved?
scaling.backpackPlaceholder: e.g., I already know who I need to speak with, and I stayed calm once this week...
scaling.recentMomentsLabel: What great moments have you noticed in the past days and weeks?
scaling.recentMomentsPlaceholder: e.g., A moment when this was a little easier, lighter, or more possible...
scaling.nextStepLabel: What would a {{nextScore}} look like? What could you do by tomorrow?
scaling.nextStepPlaceholder: e.g., Write the first three lines, ask one person, block 15 minutes...

unlock.title: CoachMe Vault
unlock.description: Enter your account password to decrypt your session data.

safety.pauseMessage: This walkthrough is paused. There is no rush to return.
safety.disclosure: This tool may run limited phrase-based distress checks only to show support resources. If you need support at any time, press the button above.

navigation.reviewAnswers: Review & edit all my answers so far
navigation.addNote: Add a note for this phase

progress.title: Your Progress
progress.empty: No sessions yet. Start your first walkthrough to see your progress here.

resume.title: Resume Session
resume.message: You have an incomplete session from {{date}}. Would you like to continue where you left off?

errors.notAuthorized: You are not authorized to access this session

restart.confirm: Cancel this walkthrough and start over? Your current answers will be deleted.
restart.error: Could not start over. Please try again.
